name: mapco-erp-system
description: MAPCO ERP SYSTEM - Desktop ERP for packaging, printing, and die-cutting operations

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json
scripts.clean:data: node -e "const fs=require('fs'), path=require('path'), os=require('os'); const p=path.join(os.homedir(),'AppData/Roaming/mapco-erp-system/data'); fs.rmSync(p,{recursive:true,force:true}); console.log('Realm data removed')"
